category_sources: Official GitHub README describes WuppieFuzz as a REST API fuzzer supporting black-box, grey-box, and white-box testing.
source_facts.description says WuppieFuzz is a coverage-guided REST API fuzzer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses WuppieFuzz.
source_facts.homepage is the official TNO-S3/WuppieFuzz repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install, run, configuration, reports, and development documentation.
Official GitHub README links to the repository tutorial for follow-along guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/TNO-S3/WuppieFuzz, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include openapi, fuzzing, fuzzer, rest-api-test, and api-fuzzer.
Official GitHub repository language summary is primarily Rust.
source_facts.description identifies REST API fuzzing on LibAFL.
